taskTemplate.name: Pre-Closing Document Quality Assurance
taskTemplate.description: Quality assurance review of pre-closing documents

subTaskTemplate.name: Commitment Letters
subTaskTemplate.description: Commitment Letters – Ensure all commitment letters that were sent to the borrower are saved to the file.
subTaskTemplate.type: Pre-Closing Document Quality Assurance – Commitment Letters

subTaskTemplate.name: RI HLPA 3 Form
subTaskTemplate.description: RI HLPA 3 Form – Ensure the Rhode Island HLPA-3 form is saved to the file when applicable to the loan.
subTaskTemplate.type: Pre-Closing Document Quality Assurance – RI HLPA 3 Form

subTaskTemplate.name: Counteroffer
subTaskTemplate.description: Counteroffer – Ensure the counteroffer is saved along with the corresponding 1008.
